subject: Painting that doesn't dent your doors
body:
Hi James,

Bobsled's commercial TI work — Niche Technology and the like — is where paint damage on freshly hung doors and finished trim costs you the most. Punch list items, change orders, client conversations.

Ashrah Painting includes professional cleaning at handoff. No dings on walls, doors, or finished surfaces. Lumia auto-reports daily and your PM can ask it where we are anytime.

We're a few minutes from your Sherbrook office. Coffee this week?
signals_used: Bobsled at 194 Sherbrook St., Winnipeg; portfolio includes Niche Technology TI (2016) + custom residential.
